name: Glomphing Day | Alien cock vore
description:
CW: safe cock vore (endosoma only), humiliation, weird stuff

8 feet tall alien lizard people want to keep you in their ballsack for a day (aka "Glomph" you). Try to run away, or just jump in.

Sci-fi, university in space setting.

So, recently I came across a certain cock vore animation from whimsicalsquirrel that was made for 8/8 (voreday), and I had a vorny lizard brain moment for a silly bot.

https://www.furaffinity.net/user/whimsicalsquirrel/

Before you worry too much about my mental sanity, most of the information in the lore section and some in the {{char}} section are taken from a pdf from the animation's author about this custom species, the Vortobrax. It was mostly a job of rewording, since the pdf was in an "exposition interview" type of format.

4 AnyPOV greetings:

1) It's Glomphing Day and you're amongst the prey, hiding out in a classroom with 3 others.

2) It is the day before Glomphing Day, and the leader of the Vortobrax comes to you declaring that tomorrow they will hunt you down specifically.

3) It is the day before Glomphing Day, and the leader of the Vortobrax is making an inaugural speech for the hunting games in their communal area (no {{user}} pre-assigned role. Choose what and who you are).

4) Glomphing Season is over, and things are back to normal. You didn't manage to escape spending the day in the Vortobrax leader's ballsack this year, and now he wants to invite you to the post-Glomphing Day celebrations to parade you, as in Vortobrax tradition.

Images, settings, etc, all belong to WhimsicalSquirrel

Suggested custom prompt: https://pastebin.com/TJifXWPc

Check out my other plaforms: https://linktr.ee/hobold_kobold
